NasaApiConfig - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Configuration class responsible for creating a shared RestClient used to communicate with NASA APIs.
NasaApiConfig() - Constructor for class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa.NasaApiConfig
 
NasaApodClient - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Client responsible for interacting with NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD) API.
NasaApodClient(RestClient, String) - Constructor for class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa.NasaApodClient
Constructs the APOD client.
nasaId - Variable in class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto.ItemRequest
NASA-provided identifier for the item.
nasaId - Variable in class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto.ItemResponse
NASA-provided identifier.
NasaImageClient - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Client used to search NASA's public image library.
NasaImageClient(RestClient) - Constructor for class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa.NasaImageClient
Constructs the image client.
NasaImageSearchResponse - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Represents the JSON response returned by NASA's image search API.
NasaImageSearchResponse() - Constructor for class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa.NasaImageSearchResponse
 
NasaImageSearchResponse.Collection - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Container holding the returned items.
NasaImageSearchResponse.Data - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Metadata describing the media asset.
NasaImageSearchResponse.Item - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Individual search result entry.
NasaImageSearchResponse.Link - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Link to a preview or thumbnail image.
NasaIngestService - Interface in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.service
Service responsible for ingesting data from NASA APIs.

NasaOsdrClient - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.integration.nasa
Client responsible for querying NASA's Open Science Data Repository (OSDR).

Constructs the OSDR client.

Identifies the NASA API that provided a media item.
